description: Gatling provides load testing software for web applications, with open-source and enterprise offerings focused on code-driven performance testing and analysis. Its products support creating, running, and analyzing load tests across CI/CD and DevOps workflows.
summary: Gatling exposes a documented Gatling Enterprise public HTTP API and a Gatling MCP Server; authentication details and machine-readable endpoint/spec URLs were not retrievable from the public docs pages that were accessible.
